title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Whirlpool India Advisory Limited in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Whirlpool India Advisory Limited:
Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India Advisory Limited!
